# OpenSIN Documentation

> Canonical docs, governance, and surface registry for the OpenSIN-AI ecosystem.

## Site

- Docs: https://docs.opensin.ai
- Main site: https://opensin.ai
- Marketplace: https://my.opensin.ai
- Blog: https://blog.opensin.ai

## Start here

- Getting started: https://docs.opensin.ai/guide/getting-started.html
- Surface registry: https://docs.opensin.ai/governance/domain-registry.html
- Architecture overview: https://docs.opensin.ai/architecture/overview.html
- API overview: https://docs.opensin.ai/api/overview.html
- Best practices: https://docs.opensin.ai/best-practices/index.html

## Surface snapshot

- Public: opensin.ai, my.opensin.ai, blog.opensin.ai, docs.opensin.ai
- Gated: chat.opensin.ai
- Internal/unverified: api.opensin.ai, opensin.ai/agents

## Core topics

- A2A protocol
- agent orchestration
- model routing
- plugin system
- MCP integration
- security and approval lanes
- deployment and monitoring
